mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO kb_chunk ( document_id, category_id, chunk_index, content, content_hash, source_title, source_page, embedding, enabled ) VALUES ( #{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.categoryId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.contentHash}, #{chunk.sourceTitle}, #{chunk.sourcePage}, TO_VECTOR(#{chunk.vectorLiteral}), 1 )
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, category_id, chunk_index, content, content_hash, source_title, source_page, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM kb_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index
